Strelen Control Systems is a company specializing in industrial image processing and automation. They develop solutions for inspection, quality control, regulation, and production processes. Strelen Control Systems GmbH employs 5 people (-12.5% YoY, -1 person), founded in 2010. Headquartered in Büttelborn, Germany.
[...]

[...]
Zu unseren Leistungen zählen die Entwicklung von Industrie 4.0-Anwendungen sowie die Integration von künstlicher Intelligenz in die Auswertung optisch gewonnener Daten.

companies.name: Vision4Quality GmbH
companies.shortDescription:
Vision4Quality GmbH. Vision4Quality GmbH is a Automation Machinery Manufacturing company. Vision4Quality offers camera-based KI solutions in combination with worker guiding, AOI, and Robotic Guidance based on their own No-Code Software. Vision4Quality GmbH employs 12 people (+5.9% YoY, +1 person), founded in 2019. Headquartered in Würzburg, Bayern, Germany.
[...]
Mit KI-basierten AOI- und Werkerführungssystemen Ausschuss verringern und Qualität erhöhen. Wir vereinen moderne Kameratechnik mit benutzerfreundlicher Software für jeden Use-Case.
[...]
Durch unsere No-Code-Philosophie machen wir selbst komplexe Kamera-Applikationen für ungeschulte Mitarbeiter zugänglich. Mithilfe von KI-Einbindung können in wenigen Klicks Programme erstellt werden, die flexibel sowohl für Werkerführung, als auch AOI und Robotic Guidance verwendet werden können. Dabei geben unsere verschiedenen Produkte jedem die notwendigen Werkzeuge in die Hand, sich ein System nach den eigenen Bedürfnissen zu erstellen.
[...]
Unsere Produkte bieten neben hoher Perfomance und intuitiver Bedienung außerdem die Möglichkeit, Daten langfristig zu speichern und bequem vom eigenen Rechner aus zu analysieren und Arbeitsabläufe zu optimieren. 

Kontaktieren Sie uns gerne hier oder über unsere Webseite für mehr Infos oder eine online Live-Demo
[...]
Gerne installieren wir auch ein Testgerät bei Ihnen vor Ort.
[...]
- Industr

4. Full automation to optimize resources and enhance efficiency

6. 24/7 support and service for uninterrupted operations
7. All-in-one solutions without the need for third-party systems

Roboception is a pioneer in innovative 3D vision solutions that enable robotic systems to reliably perceive their environment. Reis Robotics is a globally active company in robot technology and system integration. With our headquarters in Obernburg, Germany, we are one of the leading integrators for complex automation systems in all major industries. 

Since July 2023, Reis Robotics is part of the family- owned industrial group Cocchi Technologies and FAI Holding AG. 

Reis Robotics is your partner for the conception, planning and realization of turnkey automation solutions. Today, we integrate robots from all well-known manufacturers into our automation solutions.

companies.shortDescription:
Mech-Mind Robotics. Mech-Mind Robotics is a Automation Machinery Manufacturing company. Mech-Mind provides 3D cameras and software suites for robotic system integrators. Mech-Mind Robotics employs 95 people (+6.9% YoY, +11 people), founded in 2016. Headquartered in Munich, Germany, operates in 17 countries (including China, United States, Japan, South Korea, and Mexico). Has $268.1M in total funding, with 7 prior funding rounds.

Mech-Mind is a leading company focusing on industrial 3D cameras and AI-powered software for intelligent robotics. By combining 3D vision with AI technology, the Mech-Mind team around the globe continues to set new standards in robotics, taking automation to the next level. We’re building intelligent robots with the capabilities to see, think, and act with unprecedented agility and reliability. Our innovations empower partners and system integrators to manage the most challenging automation tasks, including bin picking, depalletizing, piece picking, assembly, and quality inspection.
